goal: Ship v4.3.0 control plane: a local observability dashboard (SQLite index + localhost HTML UI + hook wiring) giving one place to monitor sessions, model calls, token spend, routing, records, reviews, decisions, and memory
acceptance_criteria: control-index builds/updates a SQLite DB at .quality-loop/control/control.db from Claude Code transcripts (sessions, model calls with exact token usage, tool calls) and CQL artifacts (records, reviews, decisions, escalations, memory lessons, progress) incrementally with no duplicate rows on re-run
control-serve serves a self-contained HTML dashboard plus a GET-only JSON API bound to 127.0.0.1 only; POST returns 405; unknown paths 404
Token spend is aggregatable by model, by day, and by session; optional user-supplied prices map yields USD, absent map yields tokens only (no vendor price data shipped)
control-ingest records host hook events and never breaks a session: malformed stdin exits 0 and logs the error
Hook autostart only fires when quality-loop.config.json sets control_plane.enabled=true; a live server is never double-started; wiring exists for claude-code AND codex hosts
check-config validates the control_plane block (port range, types); example config + schema updated; all version sites bumped to 4.3.0
New offline eval suite covers the above; CANONICAL_GATE_CASES and every doc count site updated; all suites green; CI workflow runs the new suite
Dashboard HTML has zero external references (works offline); DB directory self-gitignored so control data never lands in commits or the attestation hash
constraints: stdlib-only Python (sqlite3, http.server); zero runtime dependencies
No conversation message bodies stored: metadata, token counts, tool targets (truncated), session titles only
Server binds 127.0.0.1 hard-coded; bind address is not configurable
Autostart is opt-in (control_plane.enabled defaults to false); explicit control-serve always works
Existing gates, hooks, and eval semantics untouched except additive registration
non_goals: A hosted service, auth layer, or multi-user anything
Shipping vendor price/tier data (doctrine: dated docs only, no machine consumers)
A cost-report subcommand (v3.0 archived surface stays archived; the dashboard is a UI over evidence, not a gate)
Transcript adapters for droid/codex internals (their sessions appear via CQL records + hook events; labeled honestly)
assumptions: Claude Code project transcripts live at ~/.claude/projects/<slugified-root>/*.jsonl and are append-only
Assistant lines carry message.model + message.usage token fields; uuid dedupes lines
Hook JSON stdin shape matches existing shims (session_id, cwd, hook_event_name)
verification_plan: python3 evals/run_evals.py && python3 evals/run_memory_evals.py && python3 evals/run_reality_evals.py && python3 evals/run_hook_evals.py && python3 evals/run_routing_evals.py
live smoke: control-index + control-serve against this repo's real transcripts, curl every endpoint

validation_contract.goal: Local control plane over agent activity with zero deps and no new trust boundaries beyond a localhost GET-only listener
acceptance_criteria: control-index builds/updates a SQLite DB at .quality-loop/control/control.db from Claude Code transcripts (sessions, model calls with exact token usage, tool calls) and CQL artifacts (records, reviews, decisions, escalations, memory lessons, progress) incrementally with no duplicate rows on re-run
control-serve serves a self-contained HTML dashboard plus a GET-only JSON API bound to 127.0.0.1 only; POST returns 405; unknown paths 404
Token spend is aggregatable by model, by day, and by session; optional user-supplied prices map yields USD, absent map yields tokens only (no vendor price data shipped)
control-ingest records host hook events and never breaks a session: malformed stdin exits 0 and logs the error
Hook autostart only fires when quality-loop.config.json sets control_plane.enabled=true; a live server is never double-started; wiring exists for claude-code AND codex hosts
check-config validates the control_plane block (port range, types); example config + schema updated; all version sites bumped to 4.3.0
New offline eval suite covers the above; CANONICAL_GATE_CASES and every doc count site updated; all suites green; CI workflow runs the new suite
Dashboard HTML has zero external references (works offline); DB directory self-gitignored so control data never lands in commits or the attestation hash
evidence: run_control_evals.py green (indexer, dedupe, spend math, API, security posture, ingest resilience, autostart guard, config validation)
all six existing suites green + count lint green at new canonical number
live smoke on this repo's real transcripts with curl output recorded
verify umbrella PASS against base main
regression_risks: check-config must keep accepting v4.3.0 configs WITHOUT a control_plane block (optional field)
hook merge must not duplicate existing entries (merge_hooks list-dedupe)
count lint touches many docs; a missed site fails run_evals
attest hash must remain unaffected by DB writes (.quality-loop/ exclusion)
validation_contract.product_floor: Dashboard: keyboard-reachable nav, labeled controls, readable in light+dark, tabular numerals for token columns, no external fetches, meaningful empty states

callers_checked: install.py install_runtime copies scripts/quality_loop*.py + hosts/claude-code/*.py globs (new files ride free)
install_skill_bundle copies assets/ wholesale (dashboard.html rides free)
run_evals.py count-lint scans docs for the canonical gate-case number
stop_gate/sessionstart shims read same hook JSON stdin shape the new shim will

minimality_decision.reason: No existing surface renders sessions/spend/observability; stdlib sqlite3 + http.server cover storage and serving without any dependency (rungs 4-5). Reuse everywhere it exists: brief_routing_info for routing view, existing hook shim pattern + settings merge, install.py globs, record/lesson parsers. Rejected: new dependency (flask/uvicorn - stdlib suffices), extending brief (text, not a monitoring surface), external tools (hosted dashboards violate local-only doctrine).
lower_rungs_rejected: no-change/delete/reuse: no observability surface exists to reuse or simplify
stdlib-only-one-liner: a server + indexer + UI cannot be a localized patch
already-installed dependency: repo has zero runtime deps by doctrine; keeping it that way IS the constraint
minimality_decision.safety_exceptions_checked: Network listener is a risk boundary: mitigated by hard-coded 127.0.0.1 bind, GET-only handler, no auth surface to get wrong, no message bodies stored; security review required and planned.

plan: S1 core: scripts/quality_loop_control.py - schema/init (WAL, self-gitignored dir), claude-code transcript adapter (incremental offsets, uuid dedupe, usage/model/tool_use/sidechain/title), CQL artifact ingestion (records, reviews, decisions, escalations, memory, progress; mtime-gated re-ingest), spend aggregation with optional user prices map

S2 server: GET-only ThreadingHTTPServer on 127.0.0.1, JSON API (/api/overview,sessions,session,spend,records,routing,memory,events,healthz), serves assets/control-plane/dashboard.html at /, pidfile server.json + stale-pid cleanup, reindex-on-request debounced
S3 dashboard.html: single self-contained file, light/dark, sections: overview, sessions+detail timeline, spend charts (canvas), routing, records/reviews, memory, live events poll

S4 wiring: control-* subcommands in quality_loop.py; hosts/claude-code/control_plane.py shim (ingest + guarded autostart, always exit 0); settings.json + codex hooks.json entries; control_plane block in schema+example+check-config; install.py runtime copies assets/control-plane/; .gitignore

S5 evals: evals/run_control_evals.py (~19 cases incl. localhost-bind, GET-only, self-contained-html, ingest-never-breaks, disabled-noop, autostart-guard); CI workflow step; CANONICAL_GATE_CASES + every count site; PNG regen
S6 docs: docs/control-plane.md, README section, CHANGELOG 4.3.0, ROADMAP (landed + reconcile cost-report exclusion honestly), SKILL.md, tool-contracts.md, version sync 5 sites
S7 verify + review: full suites, live smoke, codex-review + security review + adversarial swarm, fix, attest, archive record, release train (push main + v4.2.0 + v4.3.0 tags -> npm workflow)

commands_run.evidence: config ok (4.3.0 with control_plane block; bad-field fixture rejected with 5 named errors in eval)
44/44 eval cases passed (incl. numbers-consistency lint at 164)

open_risks: Transcript format is an internal Claude Code shape; a future format change degrades to skipped lines (counted in meta), never a crash
Autostarted server outlives sessions by design; control-stop + docs cover shutdown
Same-machine processes can read the localhost API (documented; no secrets served; message bodies never stored)
review_findings: codex round 1 (gpt-5.6-sol, read-only sandbox): 8 findings (6 medium, 2 low) — transcript rewrite/deletion left stale index rows; limit=-1 unbounded; maybe_index stampede; hook timeout gaps; pid-based autostart guard; price-key typo silently prices $0; privacy overclaim; version badge. ALL FIXED + eval-pinned. Explicitly cleared: SQL injection, XSS, path traversal.

claude security reviewer (fresh context, ran_checks=true): verdict APPROVE; 7/7 properties inspected-clean; 3 low findings — no Host-header validation (DNS rebinding), server.log-before-gitignore window, tool-target disclosure precision. ALL FIXED (guard implemented + eval-pinned rather than accepted).

adversarial swarm (8 dimensions, 37 raw findings; verification cut short by agent session limit — unverified findings triaged by supervisor against code): 2 HIGH confirmed 3/3 with reproduction — (1) per-line uuid dedupe inflated token totals ~3-4x (fixed: message.id/requestId dedupe key; live totals now match swarm-measured truth: 1.5k calls/2.1M out vs 3.9k/6.2M inflated); (2) head_hash column without migration bricked existing DBs (fixed: SCHEMA_VERSION rebuild of the disposable cache). Plus ~14 smaller fixes: per-line crash isolation, stat TOCTOU, by-day recency slice, EADDRINUSE friendly error, healthz-identity serve guard, HEAD/OPTIONS 405, NaN/inf price rejection, note/description types, opt-in-strict ingest error path, shim stdin decode + host passthrough + Windows detach, dashboard router encoding + staleness token + interaction-aware polling + hasOwnProperty views, title caveat filter, honest doc wording (hook events not rebuildable; droid artifacts-only). 2 findings stale (already fixed pre-swarm), 2 accepted as documented limits (512-byte head converse; schema/module integer strictness divergence).
codex fix-verification round on the post-review deltas: pending (running)
escalation_reason: Awaiting independent review results running in background: 8-dimension adversarial swarm (workflow we7tryl4r) + fresh-context security reviewer. Codex review round 1 complete: 8 findings, all fixed and eval-pinned (164/164 gate cases green). Review objects, attestation, and release follow once verdicts land.
